title: T-034 — Scanner consume-to-WO endpoint
prompt:
# T-034 — Scanner consume-to-WO endpoint

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §10.5 (FR-WH-017), §13.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Route handler `POST /api/warehouse/scanner/consume-to-wo` validating LP+WO, computing FEFO suggestion vs picked, logging override if needed, and applying consume.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/consume-to-wo/route.ts`. Body: {wo_id, lp_id, qty_consumed, catch_weight_kg?, operator_id, session_id}. Steps per §10.5: validate (LP.status='available', LP.qa_status in ('PASSED','RELEASED','COND_APPROVED'), WO status RELEASED/IN_PROGRESS, product matches WO.wo_materials); compute FEFO suggestion (T-030); if picked != suggested, dispatch T-033 pick-override-log; apply stock_move 'consume_to_wo'; update LP (consumed_by_wo_id, consumed_at, qty); update wo_materials.consumed_qty += qty; insert lp_genealogy (operation_type='consume'). Single transaction. SLO <500ms.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/consume-to-wo/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/consume-to-wo/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given matched LP+WO and picked == FEFO suggestion, when endpoint is hit, then LP qty decrements, wo_materials.consumed_qty increments, no pick_overrides row appears.
2. Given picked != suggested, when endpoint is hit, then a pick_overrides row is created via T-033 and consume still applies.
3. Given LP.qa_status='HOLD', when endpoint is hit, then 422 returns with V-WH-SCAN-003 error.
4. Given partial consume (qty < LP.qty), when endpoint is hit, then LP.status stays 'available' and qty decrements; lp_genealogy row references consume.

## Test strategy
- RED: route.test.ts covers four scenarios via httpMocks supertest.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test consume-to-wo`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip qa_status gating.
- Do not consume against intermediate LP whose product doesn't match WO.
- Do not break single-transaction guarantee.
